tasks.title: Fork and Setup PaperQA2 Repository
tasks.description: Clone PaperQA2 repository, set up development environment, and prepare project structure for MCP integration
tasks.details: Clone https://github.com/Future-House/paper-qa.git, install dependencies with pip install -e ., create test_papers/ directory, and set up basic development environment. Verify PaperQA2 functionality with sample academic PDFs to ensure core functionality works before adding MCP wrapper.
tasks.testStrategy: Load 5-10 academic PDFs from different domains, test basic query functionality, verify PDF processing and text extraction works correctly, measure baseline performance and memory usage

tasks.title: Test and Benchmark Embedding Models
tasks.description: Evaluate different embedding models (OpenAI, Voyage AI, Gemini) for academic search quality and performance
tasks.details: Test three embedding configurations: text-embedding-3-small (current default), voyage-ai/voyage-3-lite (best cost/performance), and gemini/gemini-embedding-001 (latest performance leader). Run academic queries against each model and benchmark search relevance, response time, and API costs.
tasks.testStrategy: Create standardized test suite with 10 academic queries, measure relevance scores (>80% target), response times (<10s target), and cost per query. Document performance differences and recommend optimal model.

tasks.title: Build Basic MCP Server Framework
tasks.description: Create fundamental MCP server structure and test basic Claude Desktop integration
tasks.details: Create test_mcp_server.py with basic MCP server using mcp.server.Server, implement test tools for search and upload functionality, and verify Claude Desktop integration works with .mcp.json configuration. Focus on protocol compliance and error handling.
tasks.testStrategy: Test MCP server startup, tool registration with Claude Desktop, basic tool calls, error handling, and concurrent request handling. Verify server handles 5+ concurrent requests gracefully.

tasks.title: Design MCP Integration Architecture
tasks.description: Create comprehensive architecture for PaperQA2 MCP wrapper with proper directory structure and interfaces
tasks.details: Design src/paperqa/mcp/ module structure with server.py (main implementation), tools.py (tool wrappers), config.py (MCP configuration), and utils.py (helpers). Plan integration points with existing PaperQA2 codebase and define clean interfaces.
tasks.testStrategy: Review architecture design with PaperQA2 codebase structure, ensure no conflicts with existing modules, validate clean separation of concerns, and verify extensibility for future features.

tasks.title: Implement PaperQAMCPServer Core Class
tasks.description: Build main MCP server class that wraps PaperQA2 functionality with proper initialization and configuration
tasks.details: Implement PaperQAMCPServer class with Settings configuration, Docs initialization, paper directory management, and automatic loading of existing PDFs. Include proper error handling, logging, and resource management.
tasks.testStrategy: Test server initialization with different configurations, verify automatic PDF loading from directory, test settings override functionality, and validate proper resource cleanup on shutdown.

tasks.title: Implement MCP Tool Wrappers
tasks.description: Create MCP tool functions that expose PaperQA2's research capabilities through standardized interfaces
tasks.details: Implement search_literature, add_document, get_library_status, and configure_embedding_model tools. Each tool should handle async operations, provide detailed error messages, and return formatted responses suitable for Claude Desktop display.
tasks.testStrategy: Test each tool individually with various inputs, verify error handling for edge cases, test async operation handling, validate response formatting, and ensure proper integration with PaperQA2 agent_query functionality.

tasks.title: Add CLI Integration
tasks.description: Extend PaperQA2 CLI with mcp-server command for easy server startup and configuration
tasks.details: Modify src/paperqa/cli.py to add mcp_server command with options for config, paper-directory, embedding-model, host, and port. Use click framework for consistent CLI experience and proper argument validation.
tasks.testStrategy: Test CLI command with various argument combinations, verify help text and error messages, test configuration loading, and ensure server startup works from command line.

tasks.title: Implement Comprehensive Error Handling
tasks.description: Add robust error handling throughout the MCP integration for graceful failure modes
tasks.details: Implement try-catch blocks for all async operations, add proper logging with different levels, handle API rate limits with exponential backoff, manage file system errors, and provide clear user-facing error messages.
tasks.testStrategy: Test error scenarios including network failures, invalid files, API limits, missing directories, corrupted PDFs, and concurrent access issues. Verify all errors are logged appropriately and return helpful messages.

tasks.title: Create Integration Test Suite
tasks.description: Build comprehensive test suite covering end-to-end workflows and edge cases
tasks.details: Create tests/test_mcp/ directory with test_server.py, test_tools.py, and test_integration.py. Include pytest fixtures for test server instances, mock data, and cleanup. Test complete research workflows, error handling, and performance scenarios.
tasks.testStrategy: Run full test suite with academic PDF collection, validate literature search quality, test document management operations, verify error handling, and measure performance against target metrics (<15s response time, <4GB memory).

tasks.title: End-to-End Integration and Documentation
tasks.description: Complete Claude Desktop integration, create documentation, and prepare for production use
tasks.details: Test complete academic workflow with Claude Desktop, create comprehensive documentation including setup guide, usage examples, and troubleshooting. Prepare examples/mcp/ directory with basic_usage.py, claude_setup.md, and test_queries.md.
tasks.testStrategy: Validate complete PhD student workflow from empty library to literature review completion, test with 20+ academic papers, verify citation accuracy and academic writing quality, measure 3x speed improvement over manual methods.
